description: The Clan Abbinante is a Camorra organization operating in the northern area of Naples, specifically in the municipality of Marano di Napoli. Founded by Raffaele Abbinante, it was originally affiliated with the Nuvoletta clan and later became a trusted group of Paolo Di Lauro. The clan is involved in drug trafficking and cigarette smuggling, and has been engaged in violent feuds with rival clans. Key members include Raffaele, Guido, and Antonio Abbinante.
